news.title: Why OpenAI is considering legal action against Apple over Siri AI deal
news.description: The tensions have been aggravated by Apple’s broader AI strategy. The company’s multiyear AI partnership with Google announced this year would see Gemini technology power the next-gen Siri on devices like the iPhone.

news.title: (g+) Technology: Apple-OpenAI Alliance Frays, Setting Up Possible Legal Fight
news.description: Apple Inc.'s two-year-old partnership with OpenAI has become strained, according to people familiar with the matter, with the AI startup failing to see the expected benefits from the deal and now preparing possible legal action. (Unternehmen, Apple)
